burial.place: Epping, Epping Forest District, Essex, England

notes: Born November 14, 1544 in Epping, Essex, England. Father: Humphrey Benton Bayntun (1520-1579, died Oct 29, 1579 in Epping). Mother: Joane Graygoose (1520-1579, died Oct 27, 1579 in St Leonard Shoreditch, Middlesex — just 2 days before her husband). Married Francis Rogers of Dartford. Son: Sir Robert Rogers (1565-1639). Francis died 1568, leaving Alice widowed at 24. Died September 16, 1605 in Epping at age 60. Buried in Epping.
